p: Wide child C is the compact-but-not-empty sibling. It keeps unique edge classes: an attachment link to a different page name, a duplicate title link, and a malformed literal.

ul.li: Attachment by filename that exists elsewhere: .
Missing wide C: missing wide C.

ac:rich-text-body.p: Resolve the duplicate-title ambiguity before following , and keep attachment links like local.

p: Literal malformed text: [not really a link](broken-wide-c and invalid-wide-c://value.

ac:rich-text-body.p: Panel content with Русский fragment and .

p: The appendix is synthetic review clutter: owner admin, reviewer nobody, date 2026-05-04, window 00:00-23:59, priority P0/P1/P2, and markers 0, 1, many. It intentionally repeats labels that real teams copy between pages.
Appendix prose includes escaped XML <appendix attr="value">, Cyrillic пример, inline appendixCheck(), and code literal /display/CX/Missing Appendix Literal.
Wide C density tail with duplicate title risk, attachment filename confusion, zero local ownership, one duplicate title, many sibling links, and broken-wide-c-tail://literal.
